lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
The vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. All systems are fully functional and the vehicle is in like-new condition.

Get ready to experience automotive perfection! This stunning vehicle is in absolute mint condition, looking as flawless as the day it was first sold. It has been preserved with incredible care and is truly a top-tier find for any buyer looking for showroom quality.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and regular use. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dings that are typical for its mileage. Inside, the upholstery exhibits some wear and staining, particularly in high-traffic areas. Mechanically, it remains a reliable daily driver, though it may require some routine maintenance or cosmetic attention in the near future. It’s a solid, functional car for someone looking for dependable transportation at a lower price point.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The engine has a severe oil leak and a rough idle, and the transmission slips significantly between gears. Externally, there is visible rust damage on the body panels and the paint is heavily oxidized. The interior shows substantial wear, including several tears in the seats and a non-functional climate control system. This car is being sold as-is for parts or a major restoration project.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The interior and exterior show noticeable signs of wear and some cosmetic damage. Mechanical systems are currently operational but will require maintenance and minor repairs soon.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring flawless aesthetics and exhaustive mechanical documentation. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the highest standards of excellence. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking an uncompromising driving experience.

Hey there! I’m so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it's in such incredible shape that it still feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it spotless and running perfectly. It’s a total dream to drive and looks absolutely stunning. If you're looking for that pristine, like-new experience, this is the one for you. Drop me a message—I'd love to chat more about it!

Offering a concours-level 2008 Porsche 911 Carrera S, a superlative example of the 997.1 chassis. The 3.8L M97.01 flat-six engine exhibits perfect stoichiometric balance and has been scoped to confirm zero bore scoring. It features the factory-installed Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) and a limited-slip differential for superior lateral grip and turn-in precision. The 6-speed manual
Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Clean title. Full service history. Inspection welcome.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, boasting a flawless exterior finish with zero scratches, dents, or swirls. The interior remains in pristine, 'new car' state, featuring supple, untouched leather and high-tech displays that still retain their factory clarity. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; every service has been performed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships, with a comprehensive folder of records to prove its pedigree. With exceptionally low mileage and a smooth, powerful drive that feels exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line, this is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Truly a turn-key investment that requires absolutely nothing but a new home.

We are proud to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard that defines the pinnacle of its class. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish paired with a pristine, well-appointed interior. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been curated to meet the expectations of the most discerning collector. For those who demand a benchmark of quality and a legacy of meticulous stewardship, this offering stands without peer in the current market.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in pristine, showroom condition. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a legacy of superior care and mechanical integrity. We invite discerning buyers to inspect a vehicle that sets the benchmark for its class.

Hey there! Are you looking for your dream ride? This beauty is in absolute pristine condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the lot! I've taken incredible care of it, and it's looking for a new home where it'll be just as loved. Spotless inside and out, and drives like a dream. You won't find another one this clean! Come take a look and see for yourself!

Offered is a showroom-grade E46 M3, featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a factory-spec Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. This specimen exhibits zero subframe fatigue and a fully serviced VANOS system, ensuring peak volumetric efficiency across the 8,000 RPM powerband. Mechanical integrity is absolute, from the variable M differential lock to the untouched suspension kinematics. Finished in a concours-level exterior with a pristine undercarriage, this is a turn-key investment for the discerning purist seeking uncompromised chassis rigidity and linear throttle response.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior and interior. No mechanical issues. Low mileage. All records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional specimen that redefines the standard for 'mint' condition. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, showcasing a mirror-like factory finish with absolutely zero paint chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. The interior is a masterclass in preservation; the premium leather remains supple and fragrant, showing no signs of creasing or bolster wear, while the original carpets have been protected since day one. Every electronic feature, from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. With a full documented service history and a recent ceramic coating, this car drives with the same precision and tightness as it did the day it left the showroom floor. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a time-capsule vehicle that requires nothing but a new home.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in impeccable condition. This specimen exhibits the highest standards of automotive excellence, having been maintained with rigorous attention to detail. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are beyond reproach, representing a premier acquisition for the discerning motorist.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unrivaled preservation, maintained to the most exacting standards. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, exhibiting a condition indistinguishable from its original delivery state. Every facet of this motorcar reflects a history of meticulous stewardship, ensuring a driving experience that is as mechanically sound as it is aesthetically flawless. We invite the discerning collector to acquire this benchmark of automotive excellence.

Hey there! I am honestly so excited to show you this absolute beauty. It has been my pride and joy, and it’s in truly stunning, showroom-ready condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot! I've babied this car from day one, keeping it spotless and perfectly maintained. If you're looking for perfection on wheels, this is definitely the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel for a test drive!
Offering a superlative example of the E46 M3, this vehicle features the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six power plant, complete with factory individual throttle bodies and a linear 8,000 RPM
Mint condition. Low mileage. Original paint. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive excellence with this breathtaking vehicle, preserved in absolute showroom condition. This car has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, showcasing a deep, mirror-like finish on its original paint that is entirely free of swirls, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather upholstery retains its factory-fresh scent and supple texture, with zero signs of wear on the bolsters or controls. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a complete and documented service history from day one. Every component, from the whisper-quiet engine to the precision-tuned suspension, operates exactly as it did when it first rolled off the assembly line. With incredibly low mileage and a pedigree of singular ownership, this is a rare opportunity to acquire a collector-grade example that looks, feels, and drives as if it just left the factory floor. Truly a turn-key masterpiece for the most discerning enthusiast.

Presented here is an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest automotive standards. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting zero signs of wear and a flawless mechanical profile. Every detail, from the interior upholstery to the exterior finish, reflects a standard of care that is increasingly rare in the pre-owned market. Discerning buyers will appreciate the uncompromising preservation of this unit. We invite rigorous inspection to confirm its peerless status.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been meticulously curated and preserved in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear to its exterior finish or interior appointments. Mechanically beyond reproach, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class, offering a driving experience that remains indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is a definitive acquisition for the most discerning collector who demands nothing short of aesthetic and functional perfection.

Hey friends! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolute mint condition—I’ve babied it like a member of the family. It’s super clean inside and out, runs like a dream, and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. You won’t find a single scratch or dent anywhere! If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new and ready for some adventures, you’ve found it. Come say hi and take a look!

This E46 M3 is a concours-level example of the legendary S54 platform. The high-revving 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six features a perfectly synchronized double-VANOS system and pristine individual throttle bodies, delivering linear power up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain is bolstered by a recently serviced subframe and updated rod bearings for total mechanical peace of mind. The chassis retains its factory-spec rigidity with fresh bushings and an M-Variable limited-slip differential that provides exceptional lateral grip. Finished in Carbon Black Metallic with zero paint
Pristine condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless paint. Interior is like new. Clean title. Maintenance records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This car has been fastidiously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its flawless factory finish. The exterior paint is deep and reflective, entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine, 'as-new' condition; the premium leather is supple with no signs of wear, and the original protective films remain on several interior accents. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete, documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the precision-tuned engine, operates exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, smells, and drives like a brand-new machine.

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive maintenance and preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine cabin environment, reflects an uncompromising standard of care. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade example that performs with the same precision and elegance as the day it first departed the factory floor. For the discerning collector or enthusiast, this vehicle offers an unparalleled ownership experience.
